title: Red Netherite
description: Retextures netherite items to a redish version
body:
Retextures netherite items to be red. Kind of self explanatory.

Retextures:

-Netherite Helmet

-Netherite Chestplate

-Netherite Leggings

-Netherite Boots

-Netherite Sword

-Netherite Axe

-Netherite Pickaxe

-Netherite Shovel

-Netherite Hoe

-Netherite Ingot

-Netherite Scrap

-Netherite Block

-Netherite Spear

-Netherite Horse Armor

-Netherite Nautilus Armor 


Ancient Debris will probably not be retextured as it would be hard to distinguish from netherrack. The netherite upgrade template is already red.
